summary: Frontend-only test of NadaRuns 'Instant create, pay later' shipper flow. End-to-end happy path PASSES: login -> 6-step wizard -> Confirm & Create -> immediate redirect to /shipper-home (0.83s, well under 3s) -> green success banner 'Job SHP-1064 is live for drivers! Pay anytime from the tracking screen.' No Stripe redirect, no popup, no /checkout.stripe.com calls. New shipment appears in the active shipments list on home. Required-field regression: pressing Continue on step 1 with empty pickup shows inline error banner 'Please select or enter the pickup address.' — no red screen. Payment 'Pay now' affordance is present in shipper-tracking code (testID=payment-card / authorize-payment-button); could not visually screenshot the new SHP-1064 tracking page within run (cross-shipper API token shape returned 403 in the helper call) but tracking screen exists, renders payment card for unpaid status, and was previously validated. Overall: 'Instant create, pay later' shipper flow is working as specified.

issues: The primary 'Sign In' CTA shares its label with the bottom toggle link 'Don't have an account? Sign In' (when in Register mode). Consider adding a stable testID like 'shipper-login-submit' to disambiguate and improve test reliability.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Reference: theme/shadows definitions used across screens.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: likely from a dependency or shared wrapper.

action_items: Optional polish: add testID='shipper-login-submit' to the primary Sign In button (line 275 of /app/frontend/app/shipper-login.tsx) so automated tests don't collide with the mode-toggle 'Sign In' link.
Optional: migrate deprecated shadow* style props to boxShadow and props.pointerEvents to style.pointerEvents to silence warnings (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: shipper-create.tsx submit handler correctly removes the blocking Stripe call and uses router.replace('/shipper-home?created=1&order=...'); idempotency key is rotated after success and the wizard is reset — good.
shipper-home.tsx already surfaces the banner via params.created==='1' using testID='job-success-banner' and clears the param via router.setParams — verified end-to-end.

shipper-tracking.tsx Payment card (testID='payment-card') with Pay button (testID='authorize-payment-button') renders for ps in ['unpaid','pending','payment_failed'] — matches the 'pay later' requirement.
seed_data_creation: None (used existing demo.shipper@nadaruns.com / demo1234; new shipment SHP-1064 created during test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use position-based mouse.click(195, 418) on /shipper-login for the primary CTA, or wait for testID='shipper-login-submit' if added. Filling sequence for create wizard: placeholder 'Or type address manually...' (twice), 'Who hands over the cargo?', 'Who receives the cargo?', 'e.g., 250', /5 pallets/. Token in web localStorage key is 'nadaruns_auth_token'. New shipment banner has testID 'job-success-banner' on /shipper-home.
rca_of_issue: N/A — feature behaves exactly as approved by user. Redirect 0.83s, no Stripe call, banner message correct, shipment created and visible, validation intact.
